CVE-2019-15232.title: Live555 before 2019.08.16 has a Use-After-Free because GenericMed ...
CVE-2019-15232.summary: Live555 before 2019.08.16 has a Use-After-Free because GenericMediaServer::createNewClientSessionWithId can generate the same client session ID in succession, which is mishandled by the MPEG1or2 and Matroska file demultiplexors.

CVE-2019-7733.title: In Live555 0.95, there is a buffer overflow via a large integer i ...
CVE-2019-7733.summary: In Live555 0.95, there is a buffer overflow via a large integer in a Content-Length HTTP header because handleRequestBytes has an unrestricted memmove.

CVE-2020-24027.title: In Live Networks, Inc., liblivemedia version 20200625, there is a ...
CVE-2020-24027.summary: In Live Networks, Inc., liblivemedia version 20200625, there is a potential buffer overflow bug in the server handling of a RTSP "PLAY" command, when the command specifies seeking by absolute time.

CVE-2021-28899.title: Vulnerability in the AC3AudioFileServerMediaSubsession, ADTSAudio ...
CVE-2021-28899.summary: Vulnerability in the AC3AudioFileServerMediaSubsession, ADTSAudioFileServerMediaSubsession, and AMRAudioFileServerMediaSubsessionLive OnDemandServerMediaSubsession subclasses in Networks LIVE555 Streaming Media before 2021.3.16.

CVE-2021-38380.title: Live555 through 1.08 mishandles huge requests for the same MP3 st ...
CVE-2021-38380.summary: Live555 through 1.08 mishandles huge requests for the same MP3 stream, leading to recursion and s stack-based buffer over-read. An attacker can leverage this to launch a DoS attack.

CVE-2021-38381.title: Live555 through 1.08 does not handle MPEG-1 or 2 files properly.  ...
CVE-2021-38381.summary: Live555 through 1.08 does not handle MPEG-1 or 2 files properly. Sending two successive RTSP SETUP commands for the same track causes a Use-After-Free and daemon crash.

CVE-2021-38382.title: Live555 through 1.08 does not handle Matroska and Ogg files prope ...
CVE-2021-38382.summary: Live555 through 1.08 does not handle Matroska and Ogg files properly. Sending two successive RTSP SETUP commands for the same track causes a Use-After-Free and daemon crash.

CVE-2021-39282.title: Live555 through 1.08 has a memory leak in AC3AudioStreamParser fo ...
CVE-2021-39282.summary: Live555 through 1.08 has a memory leak in AC3AudioStreamParser for AC3 files.

CVE-2021-39283.title: liveMedia/FramedSource.cpp in Live555 through 1.08 allows an asse ...
CVE-2021-39283.summary: liveMedia/FramedSource.cpp in Live555 through 1.08 allows an assertion failure and application exit via multiple SETUP and PLAY commands.

CVE-2021-41396.title: Live555 through 1.08 does not handle socket connections properly. ...
CVE-2021-41396.summary: Live555 through 1.08 does not handle socket connections properly. A huge number of incoming socket connections in a short time invokes the error-handling module, in which a heap-based buffer overflow happens. An attacker can leverage this to launch a DoS attack.

CVE-2023-37117.title: A heap-use-after-free vulnerability was found in live555 version  ...
CVE-2023-37117.summary: A heap-use-after-free vulnerability was found in live555 version 2023.05.10 while handling the SETUP.
